title: Only allow export to admin users
excerpt:
Some companies may need to define which users can export data to each board. 
In our case it is necessary to avoid exposing our client portfolio to improper uses.

posts.author: JenneL (Jenne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Some companies may need to define which users can export data to each board.
In our case it is necessary to avoid exposing our client portfolio to improper uses.
